title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 359.081 - Limited partnership shall sue and be sued
text:
359.081.  Limited partnership shall sue and be sued. — A limited partnership shall, in the partnership name, sue and be sued, complain and defend in any court of law or equity.
(L. 1985 H.B. 512 & 650, A.L. 1990 H.B. 1432)
